name: Jeffrey Dahmer
notes: Dahmer lured victims to his apartment, where he murdered and dismembered them. He kept body parts as souvenirs. Arrested after a victim escaped in 1991.

name: John Wayne Gacy
notes: Known as the Killer Clown, Gacy buried 26 of his victims under his house. He performed as Pogo the Clown at charity events while committing murders.

name: Ted Bundy
notes: Bundy used his charm and good looks to lure victims. He escaped from custody twice before his final capture. Confessed to 30 murders in seven states.

name: Aileen Wuornos
notes: One of America's first female serial killers. Shot seven men along Florida highways, claiming self-defense. Her story inspired the film Monster.

name: Dennis Rader (BTK)
notes: The BTK killer sent taunting letters to police for decades. Rader was a church president and compliance officer when arrested in 2005 after 30 years.

name: Gary Ridgway (Green River Killer)
notes: Ridgway targeted vulnerable women near the Green River in Washington State. He confessed to 71 murders, the highest count for any US serial killer.

name: Charles Manson
notes: Manson led the Manson Family cult. The Tate-LaBianca murders shocked the nation. Manson himself did not personally commit murders but directed his followers.

name: Richard Ramirez (Night Stalker)
notes: Ramirez terrorized California with home invasions. He left pentagrams at crime scenes and had a satanic obsession. Identified by dental records.

name: Son of Sam (David Berkowitz)
notes: Berkowitz terrorized New York City, claiming a neighbor's dog commanded him to kill. His capture ended a 13-month rampage that paralyzed the city.

name: Zodiac Killer
notes: One of America's most infamous unidentified serial killers. Sent cryptic ciphers to newspapers, some of which remain unsolved. Identity never confirmed.

name: Jack the Ripper
notes: Operated in Whitechapel London. Victims were prostitutes mutilated with surgical precision. Over 100 suspects identified. Identity still debated.

name: Harold Shipman
notes: British GP who murdered patients with lethal morphine doses. Considered the most prolific serial killer in modern history. Triggered major NHS reforms.

name: Fred West
notes: Along with wife Rose West, murdered young women and buried them at 25 Cromwell Street. Victims included his own daughter.

name: Peter Sutcliffe (Yorkshire Ripper)
notes: Attacked women across Yorkshire. Police received hoax tapes that misdirected the investigation for years. Sentenced to 20 life sentences.

name: Andrei Chikatilo
notes: The Butcher of Rostov evaded Soviet police for 12 years. An innocent man was executed for his crimes before Chikatilo was identified and caught.
